summary: Completed comprehensive testing of cTrader Bot Factory system. Backend API endpoints working correctly with full validation pipeline operational. Frontend navigation and UI components functioning properly.

Full pipeline returns generate, fix, compile, compliance, backtest, monte_carlo, walk_forward stages
Full pipeline returns final_score (94.8), grade (A), decision (PROP_FIRM_READY)
All tabs in results panel clickable
action_item_for_main_agent: Configure EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable to enable bot generation functionality. All other core features are working correctly.
